description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular plot with a mix of green lawns, paved areas, and a wooden-fenced section. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and a combination of white and natural wood exterior finishes. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed across the facades, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor spaces. The property includes a spacious backyard with a patio area, a driveway, and landscaped garden beds with small trees and shrubs. The front entrance is accentuated by a set of steps and a wide pathway leading to the main door. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, set on a landscaped plot with lawns and patios.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled aerial perspective, highlighting the backyard, patio, and the wooden-fenced garden area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the bungalow from the front, showcasing the main entrance, symmetrical facade, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the bungalow from the rear, emphasizing the expansive backyard, patio, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a direct view of the back of the bungalow, revealing the steps, patio furniture, and the landscaped garden beds.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
